original_text: These values are preliminary and based on the best estimate of management, which is subject to change within the measurement period.
modified_text: These values are final and confirmed by management, and will not change within the measurement period.
claim: The acquisition fair-value amounts are final and confirmed by management, and will not change during the measurement period.
citation_as_written: Pfizer Inc., Form 10-K for fiscal 2025 (pfe-20251231.htm), Notes to Consolidated Financial Statements — Acquisitions.
notes: Source explicitly labels the values 'preliminary' and 'subject to change'; the claim escalates to 'final and confirmed' and 'will not change,' overstating certainty. Verbatim passage from the served filing (actually J&J jnj-20251228).
